contents.text: The Farming skill is leveled up by harvesting potatoes. As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per harvest also increases.

As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per harvest also increases. Higher levels unlock more drops from the Farming Bonus Loot Table.
 
The corresponding tool is the Element Hoe:
• Common: +50% Drop-Chance
• Uncommon: +100%
• Further levels increase the multiplier even more
 
Blueprints for upgrades drop when leveling up.
 
Biomass and Compressed Biomass are the central resources of this skill and are needed at the Farming Merchant and for Hub Goals.
The randomTickSpeed is set to 15 (5x Vanilla) – potatoes grow significantly faster than normal. During active Tickspeed-Events, they grow even faster.
Players who are far behind the server leader automatically receive more XP per action. More information in the Catch-Up System tab.
